markdownRemark.html:
This course was divided into two parts: Complex Analysis, taught by Prof. Cheng-Gang Shao, and Equations of Mathematical Physics, taught by Prof. Yong Hu.

  • Complex analysis
  • Equations of mathematical physics

frontmatter.title: Mathematical Methods in Physics
frontmatter.institution: Huazhong University of Science and Technology
